title: Hjumarayan Fair Isle Dog Jumper - Winter Knit Sweater with Harness Hole Stretchy Easy On/Off Christmas Jumper for Small Medium Dogs(2–54LB), Warm Shih Tzu Clothes Beige S
features: 【 Fit for all good boys and girls 】 – whether you’ve got a chihuahua or a stocky staffie (2–54LB), this dog jumper has them covered. Should measure their chest for the perfect cosy fit
【 Keep your pup toasty in this stylish christmas dog jumper 】 featuring a thick turtleneck and snug fit that’s perfect for chilly British winters – no more shivers on frosty morning walkies

【 Pop it on in a tick – no faff 】 This sleeveless dog sweater is a doddle to slip on and off thanks to its stretchy knit, so even wriggly pooches won’t put up a fight. Perfect for dogs who hate the struggle of getting dressed
【 No more soggy mishaps on walkies 】 the curved hem design keeps dog wee at bay and makes the dog coat super easy to wash and care for. Clean pup, happy home

【 From festive fun to daily strolls 】 The retro knit pattern, Fair Isle design, and faux mink make this dog jumper with harness hole both adorable and practical – perfect for chilly walks or snuggling up indoors
description: Product Description Fair Isle Dog Jumper Previous page Next page Stretch Fit: Soft, flexible knit that gently hugs your dog’s shape for a comfy, secure feel Harness Holes: Built-in leash openings so you can just clip on and go – no need to remove the jumper Belly Opening: Thoughtfully cut underneath to keep your pup dry during toilet time – no mess, no fuss Christmas Dog Jumper Previous page Next page XS Chihuahua, Yorkshire Terrier, Teacup Poodle S Pomeranian, Maltese, Mini Dachshund, Toy Poodle M Bichon Frisé, Shih Tzu, Pug (slim) L French Bulldog (slim), Corgi, Cocker Spaniel, Small Shiba Inu XL French Bulldog, Corgi (larger build), Border Collie (slim) XXL Female Golden Retriever, Lean Lab, Border Collie Previous page Next page Perfect for daily winter wear, festive photoshoots, Christmas dos, or a weekend away in the countryside. Whether your pooch is lounging at home, trotting through the park, or joining in family celebrations, this dog jumper delivers warmth with a dash of flair.
